Patch Set 1:

The patch fixes the loop device issue, but posix test hit another issue on RHEL 7 node:

userintf.c:592:25: fatal error: sys/stropts.h: No such file or directory

Could you please update the prep() function in lustre/tests/posix/posix.cfg to make it find those header files on RHEL 7 node?

Patch Set 1:

And please can you update the commit message to use LU-6707 on the next version? Thanks!

Patch Set 1:

This issue is now blocked by TEI-3627, I will update this patch but it won't pass the posix test until TEI-3627 get fixed.

commit.subject: LU-6707 test: load loop module to have loop devices
commit.message:
LU-6707 test: load loop module to have loop devices

Since there is no default loop device on EL7, load
loop module with option max_loop=8 to have loop devices
ready. posix.sh is not going to pass until LU-9102 get
resolved, but first fix the loop device issue.

Change-Id: I9fb9eba15099e5569dbc04fcd4454656a59fdd52
